sections.paragraph:
ἠπίως adv. of ἤπιος (since Soph., El. 1439; Hdt. 7, 105; also Paus. 10, 11, 4) kindly 1 Cl 23:1.

adv. adv. = adverb, adverbially

Soph Soph , V b.c.—List 5

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

Paus Paus , perieg., II a.d.—List 5

1 Cl 1 Cl = 1 Clement—List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 439
